name: highlight
description: Marker-style inline text highlight — simulates a real highlighter pen with yellow, blue, green, pink, or purple colours
whenToUse: Use to draw attention to a specific word or phrase in prose, simulating a physical highlighter pen.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for code — use inline-code. Do not highlight entire sentences.
example: The key insight is the <Highlight color="yellow">pivot selection strategy</Highlight>.
